title: Michel Nelson
compiled_truth: Michel Nelson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-04-03 to 2001-11-27), Michel Nelson sent 8 and received 316 emails, totalling 324 interactions. Top correspondents: [Larry Campbell](people/larry-campbell) (7), [Rich Jolly](people/rich-jolly) (6), [Louis Soldano](people/louis-soldano) (5), [Earl Chanley](people/earl-chanley) (4), [Rick Cates](people/rick-cates) (4).
